props.name: glitchColors
props.description: Controls the colors of the letters rendered in the canvas.

props.name: glitchSpeed
props.description: Controls the speed at which letters scramble in the animation.

props.name: centerVignette
props.description: When true, renders a radial gradient in the center of the container

props.name: outerVignette
props.description: When true, renders an inner radial gradient around the edges of the container.

props.name: smooth
props.description: When true, smoothens the animation of the letters for a more subtle feel.

props.name: characters
props.description: String of characters to render in the canvas.
